---
title: "Pagefind Home"
---

## Introduction

This is the home page for testing pagefind search integration with Quarto websites.

## Quarto Features

Quarto supports multiple output formats including HTML, PDF, and Word documents. The rendering engine uses Pandoc under the hood.

## Search Testing

This page contains specific keywords likeastrophysics and bioluminescence that are unlikely to appear elsewhere, making them reliable search targets.
